gsheets_setup.json_hint: Google Cloud → IAM & Admin → Service Accounts → your SA → Keys → Add Key → Create new key → JSON. Paste the entire contents here.
gsheets_setup.sa_intro_admin: Upload the JSON key of a Google Cloud service account — it becomes shared across the whole tenant. The reporting service uses it to preview spreadsheets and write grades.
gsheets_setup.sa_intro_personal: Upload the JSON key of YOUR Google Cloud service account. It is used only by your exports and does not affect the shared tenant integration.
gsheets_setup.sa_section_admin: Connection via Service Account (shared across the tenant)
gsheets_setup.sa_share_hint: To open a specific spreadsheet, share it with the service account's e-mail (it appears below after saving).
gsheets_setup.share_instructions: Open the target Google spreadsheet → “Sharing settings” → add this e-mail as an editor. After that the spreadsheet becomes visible in “Export”.
